channel.title: rat-os/ratos
channel.description: An OS focusing on making klipper more approachable

item.title: RatOS v2.1.1 released
item.description: RatOS minor update v2.1.1 has been released and is available via the Mainsail update manager. Please read the release notes before updating, especially Octopus Pro H723 V1.1 and EBB42 Gen 2 users: https://github.com/Rat-OS/RatOS-configurator/releases/tag/source%2Fv2.1.1

item.title: Attention Octopus Pro H723 V1.1 and EBB42 Gen 2 Users!
item.description: RatOS minor update v2.1.1 will be released soon, which includes some hardware pin configuration changes that may affect some machines. Machines built using stock RatRig V-Core 4.0 and 4.1 electronics are not affected. For details, read the blog post here: https://os.ratrig.com/blog/breaking-changes-in-v2-1-1
